items.headline: Anaheim Ducks looking to recapture it at home in Game 6 against Edmonton Oilers
items.description:
For the Anaheim Ducks, Game 5 was a mix. A bad start, a better finish but overall, probably best forgotten.

items.headline: Connor McDavid Leon Draisaitl to play on same line in Game 6 of Western 1st Round
items.description:
EDMONTON -- With Connor McDavid not fully healthy and the Edmonton Oilers facing elimination, Kris Knoblauch is left with little choice but to go with his nuclear option in the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks.

items.headline: Stars Jamie Benn fined for cross-checking in Game 5 against Wild
items.description: NEW YORK -- Dallas Stars forward Jamie Benn has been fined $2,604.17, the maximum allowable under the Collective Bargaining Agreement, for cross-checking Minnesota Wild forward Ryan Hartman during Game 5 of the teams’ First Round series in Dallas on Tuesday, April 28, the National Hockey League’s Department of Player Safety

items.headline: Nikolaj Ehlers Alexander Nikishin injury status update April 28 2026 Carolina Hurricanes playoffs
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Nikolaj Ehlers and Alexander Nikishin could be available for the Carolina Hurricanes at the start of the Eastern Conference Second Round.
“I’m hopeful that both guys will be ready by the looks of it,” Hurricanes coach Rod Brind’Amour said after neither practiced Tuesday.

items.description:
Years of being a goalie, including 508 games across 16 seasons in the NHL, has taught Martin Biron the importance of body language and why it matters at the position, for his team and the opponent.

items.headline: Brady Tkachuk fully committed to playing for Ottawa Senators
items.description:
Brady Tkachuk said he’s “fully committed” to the Ottawa Senators and talk of him wanting to play elsewhere is frustrating.
“I feel like I’ve answered this hundreds of times,” Tkachuk said Wednesday. “I feel like I’ve never shown, never said, none of those things have ever come out of my

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning Victor Hedman playing status update April 28 2026
items.description:
BRANDON, Fla. -- Victor Hedman couldn’t stop smiling Tuesday.
Neither could many of his Tampa Bay Lightning teammates.

items.headline: Boston coach Sturm helps Bruins force game 6 in NHL playoffs against Sabres
items.description:
BUFFALO -- Marco Sturm waited as long as he could.
“I was hiding,” he said, and laughed.

items.headline: Vezina Trophy finalists for best goalie for 2025-26 announced by NHL
items.description:
Ilya Sorokin, Jeremy Swayman and Andrei Vasilevskiy were named finalists for the Vezina Trophy on Wednesday.
The winner of the award, which is given annually to the goalie voted the best at his position by NHL general managers, will be announced at a later date.
